top_signals.title: Ark Invest buys another $5 million in Bullish shares as stock slides 3%
top_signals.summary: Ark Invest bought a total of 139,117 shares of Bullish, worth about $5 million, across three of its ETFs on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
